description: Fixtures like closure_typed_captures, curried_add, fn_ref_ampersand, higher_order, and multi_caller_spec_divergent now fail under fz2-run with fz_ref_load_int ExpectedTag panics. These are real compiler2 runtime/codegen bugs exposed once semantic fixtures stop relying on dbg goldens.
title: Fix compiler2 JIT closure-call scalar lane corruption
